mapper.select: select p.*, s.company_name from products p join sellers s ON p.seller_id = s.seller_id where p.status='APPROVED' ORDER BY p.product_id DESC LIMIT #{start}, #{blockList}

SELECT p.product_id, p.seller_id, p.category_id, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.sale_price, p.stock, p.delivery_fee, p.free_shipping, p.status, p.image_l, p.image_s, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.sale_price_updated_at,
s.company_name,
IFNULL(rv.review_avg, 0) AS review_avg, IFNULL(rv.review_count, 0) AS review_count
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN sellers s ON p.seller_id = s.seller_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, AVG(rating) AS review_avg, COUNT(review_id) AS review_count FROM reviews GROUP BY product_id ) rv ON p.product_id = rv.product_id
WHERE p.product_id = #{value}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products ( seller_id, category_id, name, description, price, sale_price, stock, delivery_fee, free_shipping, status, image_l, image_s, sale_price_updated_at ) VALUES ( #{seller_id}, #{category_id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{sale_price}, #{stock}, #{delivery_fee}, #{free_shipping}, 'APPROVED', #{image_l}, #{image_s}, CASE WHEN #{sale_price} > 0 THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE NULL END )
mapper.update:
UPDATE products SET category_id = #{category_id}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, price = #{price},
sale_price_updated_at = CASE WHEN sale_price != #{sale_price} THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE sale_price_updated_at END,
sale_price = #{sale_price}, stock = #{stock}, delivery_fee = #{delivery_fee}, free_shipping = #{free_shipping},
image_l = #{image_l}, image_s = #{image_s}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where product_id = #{product_id}
mapper.select: select COUNT(*) from products where status = 'APPROVED'
select p.*,s.company_name from products p join sellers s ON p.seller_id = s.seller_id where p.status='APPROVED' ORDER BY p.product_id DESC LIMIT #{start}, #{blockList}
select COUNT(*) from products where status='APPROVED' AND sale_price > 0
SELECT p.*, s.company_name FROM products p JOIN sellers s ON p.seller_id = s.seller_id WHERE p.status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY p.product_id DESC

select * from products
status = #{status}
ORDER BY price ASC
ORDER BY price DESC
ORDER BY stock ASC
ORDER BY product_id DESC
mapper.update: update products set status=#{status} where product_id=#{product_id}
mapper.delete:
delete from products where product_id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
select * from products where seller_id = #{seller_id} AND status='APPROVED'
ORDER BY product_id DESC
ORDER BY CASE WHEN sale_price IS NOT NULL AND sale_price > 0 THEN sale_price ELSE price END ASC
ORDER BY CASE WHEN sale_price IS NOT NULL AND sale_price > 0 THEN sale_price ELSE price END DESC
ORDER BY created_at DESC
ORDER BY product_id DESC
ORDER BY product_id DESC
mapper.update: update products set stock = stock - #{quantity} where product_id = #{product_id} AND stock>=#{quantity}
update products set stock = stock + #{quantity} where product_id=#{product_id}
